title: agrostis gigantea subsp. pontica
intro: Agrostis gigantea subsp. pontica, also known as Pontic bent or giant bent grass, is a subspecies of grass within the genus Agrostis. This plant is commonly found in Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Agrostis gigantea subsp. pontica include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support overall health and well-being.
